one_minute_value_explanation: v9.3 makes release value governable as user capability: releases must now show what users can do, what changed, what evidence supports it, and what remains unproven before listing mechanisms.
thirty_second_version_delta: v9.2 bounded provider production eligibility; v9.3 fixes the product problem that users could not see release progress by making capability delta a release gate.
product_review_trigger: If a user cannot answer what changed in 30 seconds, reopen product review before claiming release-ready.
not_proven: Capability comprehension evidence is not market adoption, semantic truth, broad user satisfaction, or production provider safety.
